devdoc.details: Registry linking AgentNFT tokens to Lit Protocol PKP wallets

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

getAgentByWallet(address).details: Get agent token ID from wallet address

getAgentPKP(uint256).details: Get PKP public key for an agent

getAgentWallet(uint256).details: Get EVM wallet address for an agent (same for all EVM chains)

getChainAddress(uint256,string).details: Get chain-specific address for an agent

getChainAddresses(uint256,string[]).details: Get multiple chain addresses for an agent

params.chainIds: Array of chain identifiers to query

returns.addresses: Array of addresses for each chain

getPKPInfo(uint256).details: Get full PKP info for an agent

hasPKP(uint256).details: Check if agent has a registered PKP

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

registerPKP(uint256,bytes,address,bytes3.details: Register PKP for an agent (only backend/owner can call) Called after backend mints PKP on Lit Protocol

params._evmAddress: The derived Ethereum address (same for all EVM chains)
params._pkpTokenId: The PKP token ID from Lit Protocol

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

setAgentNFT(address).details: Update AgentNFT contract reference (in case of upgrade)

setChainAddress(uint256,string,string).details: Set chain-specific address for an agent (Solana, Aptos, etc.)

params._address: The address on that chain (as string due to different formats)

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

updatePKP(uint256,bytes,address,bytes32).details: Update PKP for an agent (for recovery/migration)

devdoc.title: AgentPKP
